changes: The SAPI speech backend is now much faster and does not lag or freeze during navigation.
Fixed a few audio issues that were reported, such as skipping or audio clicking during transitions. This required me to modify the native C library of MiniAudioEx and updating it too.
The game's audio engine was rewritten from scratch with better code readability and better structure.
Fixed a lot of problems in multiplayer game when the game is paused by the host.
Major code refactoring across game systems such as audio and race. Expect bugs in this version.
serverChanges: Fixed some issues when the game is paused by the host.
